name: contact-list-hybrid-e2e
description: Playwright + API hybrid tests for Thinking Tester Contact List

scripts.test:baseline: node scripts/ensure-report-dir.mjs baseline && cross-env RUN_PROFILE=baseline playwright test
scripts.test:current: node scripts/ensure-report-dir.mjs current && cross-env RUN_PROFILE=current INCLUDE_REGRESSION_MARKER=1 playwright test
scripts.test:compare:full: npm run test:baseline && npm run test:current && npm run test:report:compare
